acolyte.name: Acolyte
acolyte.proficiencies: Crushing, Tome · Light Protection, Shield, Nullifier

skills.name: White Magic
skills.summary: Each acquisition learns one White Magic cast. Offensive White Magic uses 【H+S】 and requires an arcane weapon. First acquisition also unlocks White Magic freeform casting.

skills.name: Savior
skills.summary: When a creature takes damage that doesn't reduce it to 0 HP, immediately perform a Cast that restores its HP. Once per conflict until start of next Party Turn.

skills.name: Spiritual Reserve
skills.summary: When a creature uses a Skill or cast costing up to 【SP × 10】 MP, spend your MP in place of theirs. Once per conflict until start of next Party Turn.

skills.name: Helping Word
skills.summary: When you or an Ally who can hear you performs a check, spend 5 MP to grant 🔼 to one die. Usable 【SP】 times per session.

skills.name: Lightbrand
skills.summary: Spend 10 MP to brand a willing creature. While active, your damaging Casts also heal the branded creature equal to the Cast's MP cost. Scene duration, one brand at a time.

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.proficiencies: Brawling, Polearm (2H), Massive (2H) · no defensive proficiencies

skills.name: Intimidating Roar
skills.summary: Spend 10 MP, 【F+S】 against Heart on a front-row Enemy (target number reduced by 【SP】). Success pushes them to the back row; their back row moves forward.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.summary: Attack a row of enemies and inflict Bleed for 【SP】 rounds (against Grace). Requires Massive or Polearm; weapon modifier counts as 0 for this attack.

skills.name: Rage
skills.summary: While in crisis, your attacks deal bonus damage equal to 【SP × 2】.

skills.name: Taunt
skills.summary: Spend 5 MP, 【F+S】 against Soul (target number reduced by 【SP】). Success compels the target to include you in its attacks/offensive casts for 【SP】 turns.

skills.name: Bloodlust
skills.summary: When you drop a creature (except minions) to 0 HP, spend 5 MP to make a free attack against another target.

skills.name: Evocation
skills.summary: Each acquisition learns one Evocation cast. Offensive Evocation uses 【M+S】 and requires an arcane weapon. First acquisition also unlocks Evocation freeform casting.

skills.name: Imbue
skills.summary: Channel a single-target offensive cast (MP cost up to 【SP × 10】) into a non-arcane weapon, spending its MP and AP. Your next attack adds the cast's damage modifier, element, and status. Ends after the attack resolves; multi-target attacks lose the imbue.

skills.name: Energy Reservoir
skills.summary: Permanently increase Max MP by 【SP × 10】.

skills.name: Dualcast
skills.summary: When casting with at least 1 AP, spend 15 MP and roll d6: 5-6 the cast resolves twice (ignoring costs and MCP) and refunds the 15 MP; 2-4 fails; 1 fails and costs an extra 15 MP.

skills.name: Mystic Mastery
skills.summary: Mystic weapon attacks can target any creature from any row, target Barrier, and use 【M+S】.

fighter.name: Fighter
fighter.proficiencies: Sharp, Crushing, Quick, Polearm (2H), Massive (2H) · Medium Protection, Shield

skills.name: Low Blow
skills.summary: Spend 5 MP, 【F+G】 against Force (target number reduced by 【SP】). Success inflicts Staggered 2.

skills.name: Quick Draw
skills.summary: Spend 10 MP to switch weapons as a free action. Usable 【SP】 times per scene.

skills.name: Perfect Grip
skills.summary: On a non-fumble attack, spend 10 MP to reroll a die showing 1 or 2; keep the new roll. Cannot gain criticals or fumbles this way. Usable 【SP】 times per scene.

skills.name: Overwhelming Attack
skills.summary: Spend 5 MP to attack an exposed creature: bonus 【SP × 5】 damage to Armor, no excess transfers to HP. Ignores resistance.

skills.name: Opening
skills.summary: When you break a creature's Armor, spend 5 MP to make a free attack against it.

landwarden.name: Landwarden
landwarden.proficiencies: Crushing, Mystic (2H), Tome · Light Protection, Nullifier

skills.name: Call Spirit
skills.summary: In Clash, spend 5 MP and roll d6 to summon a spirit. Spirit effects trigger at end of Party Turn. Up to 【SP】 spirits active at once (minimum one).

skills.name: Ancestral Blessing
skills.summary: While a spirit is active, gain its ancestral blessing. Spend 10 MP to consume an active spirit and unleash a stronger version of its effect.

skills.name: Natural Magic
skills.summary: Each acquisition learns one Natural Magic cast. Offensive Natural Magic uses 【F+S】 and requires an arcane weapon. First acquisition also unlocks Natural Magic freeform casting.

skills.name: Barrier Transfer
skills.summary: When another creature would take non-true damage, consume all your Barrier to reduce it by that amount. May Defend as part of this. Once until start of your next turn.

skills.name: Land Protection
skills.summary: Increase your Barrier value by 【SP × 5】.

minstrel.name: Minstrel
minstrel.proficiencies: Sharp, Quick, Short, Long (2H) · Medium Protection

skills.name: Tunes
skills.summary: Each acquisition learns one Resonance tune. Offensive tunes use 【G+H】. First acquisition also unlocks Resonance freeform casting.

skills.name: Inspiring Echo
skills.summary: Your HP/MP restoration to yourself and allies is increased by 【SP × 3】.

skills.name: Reverbrating Strike
skills.summary: After playing a tune, your next attack deals bonus damage equal to 【SP × 3】.

skills.name: Rhythm Step
skills.summary: After playing a tune, perform the Switch action for free.

skills.name: Dynamic Duet
skills.summary: Spend 20 MP to choose a Duet Partner. Roll 2d10 immediately and at the start of each Party Turn; choose one result — both of you gain that song effect. Lasts until Clash ends or partner is reassigned.

monk.name: Monk
monk.proficiencies: Sharp, Crushing, Quick, Brawling, Tome · no defensive proficiencies

skills.name: ☯︎ Body
skills.summary: Attacks gain bonus damage equal to 【SP】 and empowers Techniques. Spend 5 MP to open a Body chakra; it carries to next Party Turn only if used this turn.

skills.name: ☯︎ Spirit
skills.summary: Permanently +【SP × 3】 Max HP and empowers Techniques. Spend 5 MP to open a Spirit chakra; it carries to next Party Turn only if used this turn.

skills.name: ☯︎ Clarity
skills.summary: Permanently +【SP × 3】 Barrier and empowers Techniques. Spend 5 MP to open a Clarity chakra; it carries to next Party Turn only if used this turn.

skills.name: Technique
skills.summary: Spend 5 MP to release a Technique with your opened chakras. Requires Unarmed, Brawling, or Crushing main hand; no Shield or Nullifier. All Techniques are Gate 1 and ignore MAP.

skills.name: Absorb Chakra
skills.summary: Consume one or more active chakras; restore HP and MP by 【SP × 5】 per chakra consumed.

nocturne.name: Nocturne
nocturne.proficiencies: Sharp, Quick, Polearm (2H), Massive (2H) · Medium Protection

skills.name: Dark Magic
skills.summary: Each acquisition learns one Dark Magic cast. Offensive Dark Magic uses 【H+S】. First acquisition also unlocks Dark Magic freeform casting.

skills.name: Drain
skills.summary: Whenever you damage a creature with an attack or cast, gain HP and MP equal to 【SP】.

skills.name: Ebonblade
skills.summary: Spend 10 MP to conjure a spectral 2H dark weapon (Polearm or Massive), modifier 10 + 【SP × 2】. Attacks with it start at Gate 3, deal dark damage ignoring dark resistance. Vanishes when a new ebonblade is made.

skills.name: Borrowed Power
skills.summary: During Party Turn, gain 3 AP immediately. After your turn ends, you cannot act or react until the end of the next Party Turn.

skills.name: Soul Exchange
skills.summary: Swap your current HP and MP with another willing creature (values above max become max). Once per scene.

physician.name: Physician
physician.proficiencies: Sharp, Crushing, Quick, Short, Tome · Light Protection, Shield

skills.name: Numbing Draught
skills.summary: Spend 2 IP to heal a creature up to 【SP × 15】 HP (can overheal to 150% Max). Target gains the Draught debuff: at start of next Party Turn, it takes damage equal to HP healed (cannot drop below 1 HP).

skills.name: Refined Medicine
skills.summary: IP-spending abilities heal +【SP × 5】. Draught feedback damage is reduced by 【SP × 5】.

skills.name: Revitalizing Stimulant
skills.summary: Spend 2 IP on a creature. The next time it enters crisis, it immediately regains 【SP × 15】 HP. Doesn't stack.

skills.name: Prime Elixir
skills.summary: Spend 3 IP to prime a creature: it gains 🔼 to one attribute of your choice until the scene ends. Stacks with other 🔼 effects.

skills.name: Emergency Medicine
skills.summary: When an Ally is threatened, apply Numbing Draught or Revitalizing Stimulant before damage resolves. Once per conflict until start of next Party Turn.

provisioner.name: Provisioner
provisioner.proficiencies: Sharp, Crushing, Polearm (2H), Massive (2H), Short · Heavy Protection, Shield

skills.name: Bigger Bag
skills.summary: Permanently +【SP × 3】 Max IP. Attack an exposed creature with your bag: 【F+F】, damage HR + your current IP, then lose 2 IP.

skills.name: Premium Pass
skills.summary: Access exclusive suppliers: Inventory actions can use items up to Tier 【SP】.

skills.name: Discount
skills.summary: Purchases and equipment upgrades cost 【SP × 5】% less zenit (max discount set by GM).

skills.name: Two for One
skills.summary: When an Ally spends IP on an Inventory Action, immediately attack with Bigger Bag, make a free Inventory Action, or use an IP-spending Skill, up to the amount they spent.

skills.name: Jack in a Box
skills.summary: Spend 3 IP, roll 3d6 and assign to the Jack-in-the-Box tables (target / amount / effect). Reroll up to 【SP】 unwanted dice.

skills.name: Mark
skills.summary: Spend 10 MP to Mark a creature. Damage you deal to it with Short or Long gains +【SP × 2】. Lasts until you mark another creature or the scene ends.

skills.name: Burning Arrow
skills.summary: Spend 10 MP to ignite a column. At end of round, each unit on those tiles takes 10 true fire damage. Lasts 【SP】 rounds.

skills.name: Precision
skills.summary: Checks with Short and Long weapons crit on any doubles (if not a fumble), not just 6+.

skills.name: Silencing Shot
skills.summary: When an opponent Casts, spend 10 MP to make a ranged attack against them; on success (against Mind), Silenced 1 and the Cast is interrupted. Once per conflict until start of next Party Turn.

skills.name: Ranger's Reprisal
skills.summary: When your Marked target attacks, spend 10 MP to immediately attack it for +【SP × 3】 damage. The Mark is then removed.

scholar.name: Scholar
scholar.proficiencies: Sharp, Crushing, Quick, Focus, Tome · Light Protection, Nullifier

skills.name: In the Know
skills.summary: On reaching a new location, spend up to 【SP × 5】 MP; each 5 MP buys one truthful GM answer about the surroundings and its people.

skills.name: Pattern Recognition
skills.summary: In Clash, when a creature rolls a non-crit non-fumble attack/cast, force it to reroll one die. Usable 【SP】 times per scene.

skills.name: Best Way to Do It
skills.summary: Before a check that doesn't include Mind, spend 20 MP to replace one attribute die with Mind.

skills.name: Contingency Plan
skills.summary: After resting, roll 【SP】 Mind dice and record them. Before a check, replace up to two dice with recorded results (even impossible ones). Matched contingency numbers don't crit or fumble. Unused rolls discard on next rest.

skills.name: Stratagem
skills.summary: First acquisition grants one Schema and one Gambit; each further 【SP】 grants a Schema OR Gambit. Deploy on a grid for combined MP cost; upkeep half the Gambit's MP each Party Turn or it ends.

sentinel.name: Sentinel
sentinel.proficiencies: Sharp, Crushing, Polearm (2H) · Heavy Protection, Shield

skills.name: Intercept
skills.summary: When another creature is threatened, take their place. If the danger already affected you, it hits you twice. Usable 【SP】 times until start of next Party Turn.

skills.name: Steadfast
skills.summary: When you Intercept, spend 5 MP to halve the triggering damage (only the first instance if it hits you twice). Once until start of next Party Turn.

skills.name: Fortify
skills.summary: While wearing Heavy Protection, increase your Armor value by 【SP × 5】.

skills.name: Shield Slam
skills.summary: When you Defend with a Shield equipped, make a free attack against an exposed Enemy: 【F+F】, damage HR + Shield's Armor value + 【SP × 2】.

skills.name: Stand Behind Me
skills.summary: Allies in the grid space behind you gain resistance to column-based attacks and casts.

thief.name: Thief
thief.proficiencies: Sharp, Quick, Brawling, Short · Medium Protection

skills.name: Evasion
skills.summary: When targeted by an attack, cast, or danger in Clash, roll d6: on 5-6 avoid the damage entirely. Usable 【SP】 times per scene. Can't dodge tile-targeted effects.

skills.name: Footwork
skills.summary: After you attack, Stride or Switch as a free action.

skills.name: Slice and Dice
skills.summary: Spend 10 MP and roll 5d6; the poker-style combination determines the effect (pairs to five-of-a-kind, multiplied damage). No crits or fumbles. Requires Quick main hand. Usable 【SP】 times per scene.

skills.name: Steal
skills.summary: Spend 10 MP, 【G+M】 against Soul (target number reduced by 【SP】). Success grants 【SP】 IP to you or an Ally. One attempt per Enemy.

skills.name: Payback
skills.summary: When an exposed creature attacks or casts at you and deals no damage (miss or fully absorbed), immediately make a free attack against it.

skills.name: Animal Companion
skills.summary: Choose a companion (Swift / Loyal / Tough); its level equals yours. It acts using your AP, flees at 0 HP and rejoins next scene at its crisis score, and rests when you rest.

skills.name: Track
skills.summary: Checks to track a creature, item, or location gain 🔼 on both dice.

skills.name: Reveal Trap
skills.summary: When an Enemy attacks or casts, spend 3 IP to spring a trap first: 【SP × 5】 true damage plus choose up to 【SP】 riders (debuff check, forced switch, +10 damage, -15 MP, or Exposed until round ends).

skills.name: Prepared for Danger
skills.summary: When you or an Ally gains a status effect, immediately perform an Inventory action to use Panacea (or premium variant) at normal IP cost.

skills.name: Field Sense
skills.summary: First time you damage a plant, monster, or beast: learn its Max HP/MP OR all its resistances, and deal +【SP】 bonus damage to that monster type. Once per scene per creature.
